inline_comments.message:
Moving this file breaks config-init.sh.  This key file is used solely to encrypt the MSO openstack password and not in any sort of MSO application logic or flow.
Can you put this file back for now until you figure out a way to get at its contents within config-init.sh so that the encryption can be successful?
I feel like  this logic should be added to createConfig.sh and not createAll.bash.  Eventually, the 2 scripts can be combined/merged somehow.
